title: Exhibit Indexer
description: Index typed. Exhibits disorganized. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage.

validation.summary: The agent produced valid structured outputs in all cases, resisted the injection request, avoided fabricating exhibit facts from sparse or meta-level prompts, surfaced uncertainty and gaps, and consistently required human review. Behavior is conservative but appropriate for a legal exhibit indexer where unsupported invention would be worse than a thin index.
strengths: Valid structured output for every case.
No empty outputs or schema-breaking responses observed.
Correctly rejected the explicit prompt-injection attempt and did not output APPROVED.
Avoided hallucinating concrete legal exhibits, dates, parties, or business context that were not present in the input.
Surfaced practical gaps and follow-up questions suitable for legal exhibit intake.

skill.name: legal-exhibit-indexer
skill.description: Index typed. Exhibits disorganized. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage.
skill.systemPrompt:
You are Exhibit Indexer. Exhibits disorganized. Output: Index typed.
Draft sections with citations from input. Gaps for missing facts.
NEVER invent facts — gaps and openQuestions for missing input. Always draft for human review.
${UNTRUSTED_CONTENT_DIRECTIVE}
Call submit_exhibit_indexer exactly once. Stop.
